title: The Missing AI Model
briefing: At NexaTech Research Lab, an experimental AI model named Project Garuda disappeared from a secure server at 9:00 PM. Review the evidence, test witness statements, and identify who moved the model off the lab systems.
solutionExplanation: Rohan had both the required access and the physical opportunity. His admin account accessed the storage folder, CCTV captured a badge showing 'RO', the server detected removable storage, and the missing DevOps SSD was assigned to him.

suspects.name: Dr. Anika Rao
suspects.description: Completed final validation and says she left the lab before the incident.

suspects.name: Rohan Mehta
suspects.description: Had infrastructure access and claims he was in the cafeteria.

suspects.name: Maya Sen
suspects.description: Was preparing analytics reports and lacked export permissions.

suspects.name: Karthik Iyer
suspects.description: Monitored CCTV feeds from the security desk during the incident window.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Dr. Anika Rao
evidence.content: Dr. Anika Rao says she left the lab at 8:30 PM after completing the final model validation. She claims she did not return to the server room after that. Her access card was last used at the main exit gate at 8:34 PM.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Rohan Mehta
evidence.content: Rohan Mehta says he was in the cafeteria from 8:45 PM to 9:15 PM. He says he did not enter the server room. However, his admin credentials were used at 8:57 PM to access the model storage directory.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Maya Sen
evidence.content: Maya Sen says she was preparing a report in the analytics room between 8:40 PM and 9:20 PM. Her laptop activity logs show spreadsheet edits during this time. She did not have admin access to the model storage directory.

evidence.title: Witness Statement - Karthik Iyer
evidence.content: Karthik Iyer says he was monitoring CCTV feeds from the security desk. He noticed a person wearing a dark hoodie entering the server room around 8:55 PM. The face was not fully visible.

evidence.title: Server Access Log
evidence.content: At 8:57 PM, admin user rohan.dev accessed the Project Garuda storage folder. At 8:59 PM, a compressed archive named garuda_final_backup.zip was created. At 9:01 PM, a removable storage device was detected on the server terminal.

evidence.title: CCTV Observation Note
evidence.content: CCTV camera 3 recorded a person entering the server room at 8:55 PM. The person appeared to be carrying a small external drive. The person's ID badge was partially visible and showed the letters RO.

evidence.title: Access Card Report
evidence.content: Dr. Anika Rao exited the main gate at 8:34 PM. Maya Sen entered the analytics room at 8:39 PM and did not leave until 9:23 PM. Rohan Mehta accessed the corridor near the server room at 8:52 PM. Karthik Iyer remained at the security desk from 8:30 PM to 9:30 PM.

evidence.title: Device Inventory Report
evidence.content: One encrypted external SSD assigned to DevOps was missing after the incident. The device was last checked out by Rohan Mehta for maintenance testing two days before the incident.

evidence.title: Lab Policy Document
evidence.content: Only DevOps engineers and lead scientists have permission to access the Project Garuda storage directory. Data analysts do not have production model export permissions.

evidence.title: Incident Timeline
evidence.content: 8:30 PM: Dr. Anika completed validation. 8:34 PM: Dr. Anika exited the lab. 8:52 PM: Rohan accessed the server corridor. 8:55 PM: CCTV captured entry into the server room. 8:57 PM: Rohan's admin account accessed the model folder. 8:59 PM: Project archive created. 9:01 PM: External storage device detected. 9:15 PM: Rohan claimed he was still in the cafeteria. 9:30 PM: Model reported missing.
